charter: PM should derive the next bounded roadmap/spec/intake increment from .planning/VISION.md, current ROADMAP/SYSTEM_SPEC/docs, and product gaps after M27. Do not re-verify or seek signoff for stale M27; produce new M28-ready planning scope if remaining vision supports it.
acceptance_contract: Creates or updates planning/intake artifacts for a new bounded post-M27 increment
Aligns the increment with explicit remaining VISION.md V2/V3 scope
Does not approve or loop on stale M27 planning_signoff
Leaves product implementation to later AgentXchain governed roles
